title: Highway
description: Gives Speed II when running on "path" blocks
body:
![Highway Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f84feb9157a8aba3911591182663186a9d0f59b4.png)
# A better way to travel
This datapack gives Speed II when running on "path" like blocks! This gives more incentive to create paths between landmarks creating a more connected world. The effect is given after sprinting on paths for 1 second to avoid random FOV changes.

### Current path blocks
- dirt path
- coarse dirt
- cobblestone
- gravel

### Adding more path blocks
To add more blocks to be used edit the _path.json_ located here:
```
data/fastpath/tags/blocks/path.json
```
